etymology.description: 熟(熟) (shú, "ripe; mature; familiar") and 女(女) (nǚ, "woman") combine to describe a woman who is not only mature in age but also possesses the poise and style that can come from life experience.
etymology.interpretation: 熟(熟) (shú, "ripe; mature; familiar") provides the sense of having reached a stage of full development or maturity, like ripe fruit. This metaphorically extends to describing someone who has gained wisdom and sophistication with age. 女(女) (nǚ, "woman") specifically targets this maturity to women, together forming the concept of a 'stylish mature woman' who exudes both confidence and elegance. The word captures the idea that life experience can lead to a more polished and attractive demeanor.

examples.chinese: 她是一位典雅的熟女(她是一位典雅的熟女)。
examples.pinyin: Tā shì yī wèi diǎnyǎ de shúnǚ.
examples.english: She is an elegant stylish mature woman.

examples.chinese: 这家时装店的顾客多是熟女(這家時裝店的顧客多是熟女)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiā shízhuāngdiàn de gùkè duō shì shúnǚ.
examples.english: Most customers at this boutique are stylish mature women.

examples.chinese: 熟女们(熟女們)通常对生活有自己独特的理解(通常對生活有自己獨特的理解)。
examples.pinyin: Shúnǚmen tōngcháng duì shēnghuó yǒu zìjǐ dútè de lǐjiě.
examples.english: Stylish mature women often have their unique understanding of life.
